overview: A complete Student Course Registration Portal with CBSE-inspired design, featuring admin control panel, bulk Excel student onboarding, course management, role-based access, and PDF registration slip generation with QR codes.
features: Admin dashboard with stats and charts
Excel bulk student upload with auto-generated passwords
Student portal with profile completion gate
Course selection with conflict and credit validation
PDF registration slip with QR code and student photo
Admin-only profile updates after initial setup
